flags.description: Master toggle for membership creation. Off = POST /memberships returns 503. Emergency freeze during migrations.
Off = ProcessMembershipRenewalJob no-ops. Renewals accumulate but don't charge — customers keep access; billing catches up when re-enabled. Use during payment gateway outages.
Off = LapseMembershipJob no-ops. Failed memberships stay in active state — use during business events (grace period announcement).
Off = ExpireStalePassesJob no-ops. Passes stay available past their valid_until.
Off = 7/10-year hard-purge job no-ops. Use during compliance investigations.
Off = MembershipChargedBackNotification suppressed. Use ONLY during dispute-storm scenarios (mass fraud attack) to prevent admin inbox flood while the security team investigates.
